chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.531 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application ----------------------------------------------------- 20.03.2025 Syed Waqas Ahmed Shah, advocate for applicant Ms. Rubina Qadir, D.P.G. SIP Raja Zafar Iqbal of PS Thatta ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant, after arguing the bail application at some length, does not press the instant criminal bail application and seeks direction to the trial Court to decide the case of applicant preferably within three months. Learned D.P.G. has recorded no objection for such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed as not pressed. However, trial Court is directed to decide the case of the applicant, expeditiously, preferably within a period of three months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
